description_long: This small bird features a striking combination of black, blue, and white plumage, with a vivid blue crown and nape that contrast sharply against its black face and throat. Its wings and back are mostly dark, while the underparts are lighter, showing a gradient from grayish to off-white. The tail is long, slender, and dark, extending well beyond the body and giving the bird a streamlined appearance. The beak is short, straight, and pointed, typical of insectivorous birds. Its legs are thin and pale, with a slightly pinkish or grayish hue, and the feet are adapted for perching. The overall appearance is elegant and vibrant, making it easily noticeable in urban parks or gardens.
description: A small, vibrant bird with blue, black, and white plumage, a long slender tail, and a short pointed beak. Its striking blue crown and dark face make it visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue crown, black face, and pale legs with the tail extending directly backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue head, black throat, long dark tail, and pale underparts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue nape, dark back, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue and black head, pale belly, and the slender tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid blue crown and nape, black face and throat, pale underparts, dark wings and tail
